title: PPIP -  Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Share Data
scenario: PPIP "Share Data" toggle is ON in App Settings > General > Account after accepting data sharing during onboarding
steps: 1. Complete the onboarding flow in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the PPIP (Privacy, Performance, Improvement Program) dialog, tap "Share Data".
3. If on iOS, handle the location permission prompt (allow or deny).
4. Observe that the PPIP dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed.
5. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
6. Locate the "Share Data" toggle on the Account screen.
expected: The PPIP dialog closes, the Home screen is displayed, and in App Settings > General > Account, the "Share Data" toggle is ON with a description explaining that basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, excluding personal information and third-party sharing.
